Publish Decision

Publish completed request in the app?

Choose Yes, Publish in App to make the completed photos and data visible through the normal Drive and AV master-row flow. Choose No, Email Only to keep the completed details only in the request email thread.

New Crop Release

Send this completed row to JD?

Choose Yes, Send Email to upload NCR photos to the private bucket and email JD the completed row details. Choose No, Mark Done Only to finish the row privately without sending an email.
